hero.title: Materials for batteries, understood across scales.
hero.description: We integrate first-principles computation, high-throughput screening, synthesis, and multiscale characterization to discover advanced energy materials.
hero.imageAlt: Layered cathode crystal structure with green lithium layers and a localized cation-migration region

pillars.title: Structure
pillars.description: Characterize materials across length and time scales.

pillars.title: Mechanism
pillars.description: Reveal the origins of electrochemical behavior and degradation.

pillars.title: Discovery
pillars.description: Design and validate materials for next-generation batteries.

approach.label: Our approach · 01
approach.lead: We move between atoms, particles, and devices to uncover the hidden properties of materials.
approach.body: Computation tells us where to look. Experiments show us how materials behave. Their connection turns fundamental understanding into rational design.

recruitment.label: Join EML · 04
recruitment.titleLine2: Build the next question with us.
recruitment.description: We welcome graduate students and undergraduate researchers interested in batteries, energy materials, first-principles calculations, and machine learning.
